prestazioni: Replace the stock 2T-G (1.6L DOHC) engine with a fully built 2T-GRU (Group B rally-spec) block featuring forged Mahle pistons (87.5mm bore, 9.0:1 compression), Cunningham billet steel crankshaft, and Carillo H-beam connecting rods. Pair with a TODA Racing Stage 3 cylinder head (ported for 45mm intake/38mm exhaust valves) and a custom 272° camshaft grind from JUN Auto for optimized high-RPM power (180+ hp at 8,500 RPM on 12 psi of boost).

Install a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by HKS (equal-length, 4-2-1 design) and a Tomei 44mm wastegate. Use a GReddy Type-S intercooler (front-mount, 600x300x76mm core) with custom aluminum piping and a HKS SSQV blow-off valve. Fueling upgrades include a Walbro 255 LPH fuel pump, ID1000x injectors, and a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with custom 2T-GRU base maps.

Swap the stock 4-speed transmission for a Toyota W55 5-speed from a Celica RA40, reinforced with a Fidanza aluminum flywheel and a Tilton twin-disc clutch (7.25" diameter). Install a Cusco Type-RS 1.5-way LSD in the 8-inch Corolla differential. Suspension upgrades include Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (adjustable damping, 200mm travel), SuperPro poly bushings (full chassis refresh), and a Whiteline 22mm adjustable rear sway bar.
estetica: Fit a Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (TE27-specific, 3-piece FRP construction) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (100mm wider front, 120mm wider rear) and a custom front splitter by Veilside (30mm overhang, 50mm dive planes). Rear diffuser by Origin Labo (carbon fiber, 3-stage design) with integrated tow hooks.

Install a custom roll cage by JIC Magic (8-point, chromoly steel, bolt-in design with harness bar) and pair with Bride Zeta III seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) and Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Replace the stock dashboard with a custom carbon fiber panel by AutoTechnic, housing a Defi BF gauges (oil temp, oil pressure, boost) and a Motec C127 digital dash.

Apply a custom livery by Fatlace Graphics (inspired by the 1973 Safari Rally TE27, with period-correct Toyota Racing Development stripes and sponsor decals). Use a custom 15x8.5" SSR Mk3 wheels (ET0, 4x100 PCD) with 195/50R15 Yokohama A052 tires. Paint the body in Toyota Racing Development "Celica Yellow" (code 469) with a matte clear coat by PPG.
